title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (MS setup)
description: Thermo Orbitrap Exploris (BioPharma) Full MS intact-protein setup: HESI positive, R 30k, 1800 to 4000 m/z, in-source CID 110 V (Thermo app note 73885).

payload.description: Full MS setup for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass analysis (demonstrated on trastuzumab) on a Thermo Orbitrap Exploris 480 with the BioPharma Option, Intact Protein application mode, fed by the matching intact-protein LC gradient. HESI source, positive polarity. Spray voltage 3800 V, capillary temperature 320 C, vaporizer temperature 150 C. Sheath gas 25, aux gas 5, sweep gas 0 (arbitrary units). Resolution 30000, scan range 1800 to 4000 m/z, RF lens 200%, AGC target 300, max injection time 200 ms, 10 microscans. In-source fragmentation (in-source CID) 110 V (requires optimization per the note). Pressure mode Low; runtime 20 min. Pair with the matching LC gradient template. Source: Thermo Fisher Application Note 73885, https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/CMD/Application-Notes/an-73885-lc-ms-characterization-mabs-native-denaturing-an73885-en.pdf . Representative starting-point method (denaturing intact conditions, Intact denatured column of the note), verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.

source.other_notes: Thermo labels: spray voltage (+) 3800 V; capillary temperature 320 C; vaporizer temperature 150 C. Sheath gas 25, aux gas 5, sweep gas 0 (arbitrary units). RF lens 200%. In-source fragmentation (in-source CID) 110 V (requires optimization). Pressure mode Low; Application mode Intact Protein; Full MS; runtime 20 min. AGC target 300; max injection time 200 ms; 10 microscans.
